nasb.text: The hundred talents of silver were for casting the sockets of the sanctuary and the sockets of the veil; one hundred sockets for the hundred talents, a talent for a socket.

esv.text: The hundred talents of silver were for casting the bases of the sanctuary and the bases of the veil; a hundred bases for the hundred talents, a talent a base.

cnv.text: 他用這三千四百公斤銀子鑄造聖所的柱座，和幔子的柱座；一百個柱座用了三千四百公斤銀子，三十四公斤銀子做一個柱座。

ccb.text: 铸造圣所带凹槽的底座和帷幔柱子带凹槽的底座共用了三点四吨银子，共铸造了一百个底座，每个底座用了三十四公斤银子。
